nodes.label: AI as time-saving enabler for large-scale solo projects
nodes.label_negative: AI as insufficient for project scale without it
nodes.grounding_span: without AI I couldn't really do what I'm doing, since it would take forever

nodes.label: AI as precise executor of clear instructions
nodes.label_negative: AI as overconfident fixer causing irreparable damage
nodes.grounding_span: instruct the AI to do precisely what I want, so that the results appear as if I've chanted a magic spell

nodes.label: AI as maintainer of context and memory
nodes.grounding_span: loss of context meaning the plan couldn't be executed as it was in my head

nodes.label: AI as creative collaborator respecting unique vision
nodes.label_negative: AI as assumption-driven misinterpreter of unique vision
nodes.grounding_span: the problem with AI's is that they tend to make lots of assumptions about what the actual vision is

nodes.label: AI as debugging assistant with fine-detail speed
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable when overconfident in fixes
nodes.grounding_span: when it comes to debugging, the AI is invaluable since it has knowledge of and access to fine details

nodes.label: Productivity and project feasibility
nodes.grounding_span: a project of this magnitude done from scratch by a single person in a 1-year timeframe would be inconceivable without AI support

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and vision integrity
nodes.grounding_span: the unique vision of what I am developing, which only I can have

nodes.label: Quality of output
nodes.grounding_span: help me focus more and more on quality of output

nodes.label: Satisfaction from precise instruction execution
nodes.grounding_span: Satisfaction comes from my being able to instruct the AI to do precisely what I want

nodes.label: Frustration from AI overconfidence and misinterpretation
nodes.grounding_span: frustration comes from when things aren't working as planned, or from loss of context

nodes.label: Optimistic confidence in growing AI partnership
nodes.grounding_span: I see it growing over the short term anyway, as I develop the confidence to handle more complex projects

nodes.label: Firm resistance to AI suggestions that compromise vision
nodes.grounding_span: I am quite firm about what I want, and don't feel the pressure to accept suggestions, which mostly aren't very good anyway

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth refinement with AI
nodes.grounding_span: this requires a bit of back and forth, but I find that it's worth it

nodes.label: Meta-level creative focus over technical details
nodes.grounding_span: there is a meta-level layer that my attention goes to, around the creative process of development
